mapper.sql: SELECT id, template_code, template_name, template_type, subject, content, variables, status, created_time, updated_time FROM msg_template WHERE deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM msg_template WHERE template_code = #{templateCode} AND deleted = FALSE LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM msg_template WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE msg_template SET template_code = #{templateCode}, template_name = #{templateName}, template_type = #{templateType}, subject = #{subject}, content = #{content}, variables = #{variables}, status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = #{version} + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE msg_template SET deleted = TRUE, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
